text: A violation of Section 2430.5 or 2432, relating to emergency road service, is a misdemeanor and not an infraction.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 1. Offenses [40000.1 - 40273]
#### Article 1. Violation of Code [40000.1 - 40008]
##### § 40000.65

A violation of Section 2430.5 or 2432, relating to emergency road service, is a misdemeanor and not an infraction.

*(Added by Stats. 1991, Ch. 488, Sec. 9.)*

subsections.text: A violation of Section 2430.5 or 2432, relating to emergency road service, is a misdemeanor and not an infraction.
